executiveSummary: Iteration 000035 is fully implemented across backend, frontend, and MCP layers. All five user stories and all eight functional requirements are satisfied. No critical gaps detected.

verificationByFR.notes: OrchestrationResult has youtube_title (max_length=100, no underscores, no extensions) and youtube_description (max_length=5000) with Pydantic validators.
backend/config/model_credits.yaml exists with models list (name, role, optional url). No explicit footer: key; footer text is composed programmatically.
credits_service.py implements build_credits_block(). Handles missing file, malformed YAML, and non-dict YAML with warnings and empty-string fallback.
api.py returns X-Youtube-Title and X-Youtube-Description HTTP headers in the /api/generate response when orchestration mode is LLM.
QueueEntry interface in App.tsx includes youtubeTitle: string | null and youtubeDescription: string | null, populated from response headers.
YouTubePublishDialog component in src/components/youtube-publish-dialog.tsx provides a modal with pre-filled title/description fields, Cancel and Publish buttons, and empty-title validation.
uploadVideoToYouTube in src/lib/youtube-upload.ts sends the user-edited title and description (which includes the credits block appended by the backend) as the YouTube snippet.
publish_to_youtube MCP tool resolves title/description with precedence: explicit arg → LLM metadata → filename-derived fallback → default string.

verificationByUS.notes: OrchestrationResult fields, CREATIVE_DIRECTOR_SYSTEM_PROMPT instructions, Pydantic validation, and backend unit tests all present.
model_credits.yaml exists; credits_service.py loads and formats it; error cases logged; unit tests for valid/missing/malformed YAML present.
QueueEntry carries youtubeTitle/youtubeDescription from HTTP headers; null for non-LLM entries; frontend unit tests verify both paths.
Modal dialog opens on Publish button click; pre-fills from queue entry; Cancel/Publish work; Publish disabled when title is empty; component tests cover all ACs.
MCP tool reads lastRecordingMeta for defaults; explicit args override; filename fallback present; MCP server tests verify all three paths.

minorObservations: FR-2: model_credits.yaml has no explicit footer: key; footer is composed programmatically.
PRD truncation: US-001-AC01 and US-001-AC02 texts are cut off mid-sentence.
US-004-AC05: No automated (Playwright) browser test for the dialog flow.
Accessibility: YouTubePublishDialog lacks focus trapping (WCAG 2.1 SC 2.1.2).
UX: No character counter on description textarea despite 5000-char backend limit.

refactorPlan.title: Add character counter to description textarea
refactorPlan.rationale: Prevent silent upload failure when description exceeds 5000 chars

refactorPlan.title: Add Playwright e2e test for publish dialog
Add footer: key to model_credits.yaml
refactorPlan.rationale: Align YAML structure with FR-2 wording; enable configurable sign-off line

refactorPlan.title: Fix truncated AC texts in PRD JSON
refactorPlan.rationale: US-001-AC01 and US-001-AC02 strings are cut off mid-sentence
